conflictPolicy.footerQuota: MoAI native quota footer owns Codex quota display; do not also enable @kmiyh/pi-codex-plan-limits, pi-chatgpt-limit, pi-codexbar
conflictPolicy.agentTeams: select exactly one primary team backend per run; pi-subagents is tracked separately for Agent tool delegation, not as a team backend fallback
conflictPolicy.contextHooks: context-mode and pi-yaml-hooks can both be active, but hook/guidance ordering must be validated after restart
conflictPolicy.mcp: prefer one MCP route per workflow if pi-mcp-adapter and the native Pi MCP gateway both expose similar tools
